bme_user_mem_desc_io Struct Reference

Describes pages underlying user memory. More...


Data Fields

struct bme_user_mem_desc user
 Describes the address range of the user memory.
__u64 num_pages
 Return value for number of pages underlying the user memory.

Detailed Description

Describes pages underlying user memory.
Examples:

bme/client_server/bme_server.c.

Field Documentation

struct bme_user_mem_desc bme_user_mem_desc_io::user [read]

Describes the address range of the user memory.

Examples:
bme/client_server/bme_server.c.

__u64 bme_user_mem_desc_io::num_pages

Return value for number of pages underlying the user memory.

Examples:
bme/client_server/bme_server.c.
